meaning: adj.(意大利小说家、戏剧家)皮兰德娄(风格)的
examples: But the director, John Badham, reduces the potential Pirandellian horseplay to a series of lame Tinseltown in-jokes.
By the end, the offstage happenings become more frantic and absurd than the Pirandello play itself a Pirandellian exchange of art and life.
